title: Company Overview
note: Company profile, network scale, route miles, states served, ports, industrial sites, workforce, and capital investment context.

title: Our Railroad Network
note: Primary product page for Norfolk Southern's rail network, route miles, service region, terminals, schedules, and facility tools.

title: First and Final Mile Shipping
note: Documents rail-adjacent first-mile and final-mile services, including Thoroughbred Direct Intermodal Services as a Norfolk Southern subsidiary.

title: Overview
note: Describes TDIS intermodal transportation services for logistics companies, brokers, trucking companies, and related customers.

title: Norfolk Southern reports fourth quarter and full year 2025 results
note: Company financial release for 2025 revenue, railway operating income, operating ratio, and performance commentary.

title: Norfolk Southern Financials
note: Market-data summary of Norfolk Southern annual revenue and net income, used as a cross-check for profitability metrics.

title: Norfolk Southern Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization source for Norfolk Southern's May 2026 valuation.

title: Norfolk Southern P/E Ratio
note: Trailing P/E ratio source for Norfolk Southern as of May 2026.

title: OpenRailwayMap
note: Documents OpenRailwayMap's open-source software, OpenStreetMap data model, railway overlays, and GitHub repositories.

title: OpenRailwayMap
note: Current OpenRailwayMap application showing rail infrastructure, speed limits, train protection, electrification, and gauge data.

title: OSRD
note: Official OSRD product page for open-source railway infrastructure design, timetabling, capacity analysis, and simulation.

title: OpenRailAssociation/osrd
note: Source repository for OSRD and evidence of open-source railway planning and simulation functionality.

title: Governance
note: Explains OSRD governance, public development, and the OpenRail Association's cooperative role around open-source railway software.

title: Open Railroad
note: Rail industry open-source initiative used to support open standards and cooperative rail software concepts.
